profile_basis: After pass119 rejected blocked threading, the remaining clean GEMM residual was the single-thread 256^3 matmul_2d window. The committed code records that blocked threading failed because 16.7M FMAs is too little work per core; the next named primitive was a packed/register MRxNR microkernel.
alien_graveyard_primitive: Safe-Rust BLAS-style register tiling for GEMM: keep a small C tile in scalar registers, reuse B values across multiple output rows, and preserve per-cell ascending-k accumulation.

alien_artifact_contract.objective: Improve single-core 256^3 GEMM throughput without C BLAS/MKL/XLA and without changing f64 output bits.
constraints: each output cell accumulates l=0..k in the same order as the serial i-k-j kernel
row, column, and thread partitioning must not affect any cell's arithmetic order
alien_artifact_contract.fallback: If same-worker RCH Criterion rebench is below Score>=2.0 or regresses controls, remove the source hunk and keep only rejected evidence.

baseline_command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-pass120-gemm-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_256x256x256_f64|eval/dot_256x256x256_f64|linalg/matmul_2d_512x512x512_f64' --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
proof_command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-pass120-gemm-test cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d -- --nocapture
rebench_command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-pass120-gemm-candidate cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_256x256x256_f64|eval/dot_256x256x256_f64|linalg/matmul_2d_512x512x512_f64' --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

candidate.lever: MR4xNR4 scalar-register tile inside matmul_2d_row_block, with scalar fallback for row and column tails.

result.decision: Reject and restore source to empty tensor_contraction.rs diff.

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: Candidate proof tests passed before rejection. Each accepted tile accumulated each cell in l=0..k order; tails used the old scalar loop.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: N/A: GEMM has no sorting or tie-breaking.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Candidate was bit-isomorphic in tests, but rejected for speed. No floating-point behavior changed in kept source because the source hunk was removed.

validation: RCH focused cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d passed 5 tests on ts2 before rejection.
Post-revert git diff -- crates/fj-lax/src/tensor_contraction.rs is empty.
next_pivot: Do not retry MR4xNR4 scalar register tiling. The regression indicates the existing i-k-j row scan is better matched to autovectorization/prefetch at 256^3. Next attack should be a different primitive: packed A/B panels plus explicit safe portable-SIMD once stable/allowed, or a behavior-contract bead for FP-reordering blocked/Strassen-style GEMM if JAX tolerance parity is accepted.
